mvw.mvw_command: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm exec vitest run --exclude packages/svelte/tests/runtime-browser/test.ts
mvw.input_scale: Full repo workspace install and vitest suite excluding Playwright browser-launch file
mvw.success_criteria: exit code 0, vitest reports passing suite

environment.methodology: tutorial.md one-pass profiling; process-group/tree RSS sampled by monitor_tree.sh every 0.5s; MVW actually executed.

static_triage.notes: TypeScript/JavaScript monorepo using pnpm and vitest; no explicit GPU requirement. Browser-launch test file is excluded because it requires preinstalled Playwright browser binaries.

peaks_observed.cpu_utilization_summary: build and test phases are CPU-intensive with multiple worker processes

min_hardware.summary: 2 vCPU / 4 GB RAM / 1 GB disk, no GPU. Raw process-tree peaks: build 0.7781 GB, run 3.5255 GB, disk 0.2754 GB.
